hero.role: Computer Engineering Graduate | Web & Mobile Developer
exp.title: Work
exp.subtitle: My professional career in software development
exp.desc.fullstack: Laravel development of an enterprise resource planning (ERP) platform.
exp.desc.intern: Internship in web development using Laravel to maintain and improve internal applications.
projects.title: My
projects.subtitle: Some of the projects I have worked on
projects.desc.phobia: Unity application combining virtual environments and haptic feedback to support phobia therapy in an immersive way.
projects.desc.guaguas: Web application showing the stops and routes of the Municipal Buses of Las Palmas of Gran Canaria.
projects.desc.stellar: Interactive experience simulating the solar system with motion effects to convey the sensation of traveling through the cosmos.
projects.desc.dbreeze: Application allowing connection to MySQL, SQLite, and LibSQL databases to manage and visualize data efficiently.
projects.desc.textsnap: Mobile application to quickly extract text from images using optical character recognition (OCR).
projects.desc.imageviewer: Lightweight and fast image viewer supporting multiple formats following the Model-View-Controller (MVC) design pattern.
projects.desc.money: Currency calculator that converts between different currencies using exchange rates according to the date entered.
skills.title: Skills &
skills.subtitle: Combination of technical and personal skills
skills.teamwork.desc: Keen interest in cooperating and learning alongside others
skills.communication.desc: Effort to convey ideas clearly and understandably
skills.time.desc: Daily organization to maintain steady progress
skills.adaptability.desc: Readiness to adapt to new technologies
about.title: About
about.subtitle: Learn more about my story and passions
about.bio1: Since I started programming, I discovered how much I enjoy creating things from scratch and seeing how an idea can be transformed into something functional. I like facing new challenges, understanding how things work, and always looking for the best way to do them. Programming, for me, is a way to constantly learn and improve with every line of code.
about.bio2: I am a curious person and eager to keep growing. I am motivated to learn, share ideas and continue specializing in web development and software engineering, exploring new technologies that inspire me to keep creating.
